# Starter Feature Summary

## Included now

- Next.js 15 App Router starter routes
- Shared onboarding suggestion backend
- InsForge-ready onboarding env contract
- Safe auth, Prisma, Supabase, and Stripe helpers
- Vitest coverage for onboarding discovery and suggestion fallback
- Playwright smoke coverage for the starter shell

## Optional integrations

- Google auth provider
- Supabase-backed data flows
- Stripe subscriptions
- InsForge remote onboarding suggestions

## Verification targets

- `npm run lint`
- `npx tsc --noEmit`
- `npm run test -- --run`
- `npm run test:e2e`
- `npm run build`
